name: rag
author: alice
_note: Minimal RAG test app — exposes search and index over a qdrant backend running in the app's compose. handler='http' = isannd가 컨테이너의 endpoint 로 dispatch. wire name = alice__rag__search / alice__rag__index. policy 키 = alice_rag@0.1.0.

function.name: search
function.description: Semantic search over the indexed corpus. Returns top-k chunks with scores.

function.name: index
function.description: Add a document chunk to the index. Operator only — mutates corpus state.
